    • Uses of BaseBean in in.co.rays.proj4.bean

      Subclasses of BaseBean in in.co.rays.proj4.bean 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  BatchBean  
      class  CollegeBean
      CollegeBean represents a College entity in the application.
      class  CourseBean
      CourseBean represents a Course entity in the application.
      class  EmiBean  
      class  FacultyBean
      FacultyBean represents a Faculty entity in the application.
      class  MarksheetBean
      MarksheetBean represents the marksheet details of a student.
      class  PasswordBean  
      class  RoleBean
      RoleBean represents different user roles in the application.
      class  StudentBean
      StudentBean class represents the Student entity.
      class  SubjectBean
      SubjectBean class represents the Subject entity.
      class  TimetableBean
      TimeTableBean class represents the Time Table entity.
      class  TopicBean  
      class  UserBean
      UserBean represents a User entity in the application.
      class  WarrantyBean

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      protected BaseBean BaseCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates a bean with data from HTTP request parameters.

      Populates a UserBean from request parameters.

      Populates CollegeBean from request parameters.

      Populates FacultyBean from request parameters.

      Populates FacultyBean from request parameters.
      protected BaseBean ForgetPasswordCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates a UserBean with the login (email) parameter from the request.
      protected BaseBean GetMarksheetCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates a MarksheetBean from the request parameters.
      protected BaseBean LoginCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates UserBean from request parameters.
      protected BaseBean MarksheetCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates a MarksheetBean from request parameters including optional conversion of marks to Integer and sets audit fields by calling BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest).
      protected BaseBean MarksheetListCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates a MarksheetBean from request parameters for use in search or other operations.
      protected BaseBean MyProfileCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates a UserBean from request parameters and sets audit fields via BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest).
      protected BaseBean PasswordCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)  
      protected BaseBean PasswordListCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)

      Populates RoleBean with request parameters.

      Populates RoleBean with request parameters.
      protected BaseBean StudentCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates StudentBean with request parameters.
      protected BaseBean StudentListCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates StudentBean with request parameters for search criteria.

      Populates SubjectBean with request parameters.

      Populates SubjectBean with request parameters.

      Populates a TimetableBean from request parameters and sets audit fields via BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest).

      Populates a TimetableBean from request parameters for use in search or other operations.

      Populates UserBean with request parameters.
      protected BaseBean UserListCtl.populateBean​(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates a UserBean from request parameters for use in searching or filtering the user list.

      Populates UserBean with request parameters.

      protected BaseBean BaseCtl.populateDTO​(BaseBean dto, javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates audit fields of the DTO such as createdBy, modifiedBy, createdDatetime, and modifiedDatetime.

      protected BaseBean BaseCtl.populateDTO​(BaseBean dto, javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Populates audit fields of the DTO such as createdBy, modifiedBy, createdDatetime, and modifiedDatetime.
